prestazioni: Engine: L87 6.2L V8 (EcoTec3) with forged internals (Manley H-beam connecting rods, Mahle forged pistons, and ARP head studs) paired with a custom camshaft profile (Lunati Voodoo 227/233 at 0.050" lift) for a 7,000 RPM redline and 550+ WHP on E85 via a Speedmaster billet crankshaft.

Forced Induction: Twin-turbo setup using Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (84mm compressor wheels) with Tial MV-R 60mm wastegates, custom 4-inch stainless steel intercooler piping, and a PWR 4.5-core intercooler (1,200 HP capable) fed by dual 1,000cc ID1000 injectors and a Fore Innovations 450 LPH fuel pump.

Drivetrain & Suspension: 10-speed 10L90 transmission reinforced with a Sonnax billet valve body and a PML deep transmission pan, paired with a 40-spline Strange Engineering 9-inch rear end (3.90:1 gear ratio) and a Detroit Truetrac differential. Suspension overhaul includes KW Clubsport 3-way coilovers with remote reservoirs, Eibach front and rear sway bars (28mm front, 25mm rear), and polyurethane bushings from Energy Suspension for chassis rigidity.
estetica: Widebody Conversion: Rocket Bunny/Pandem GMC Yukon Denali kit (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper with integrated tow hooks, and a carbon fiber rear diffuser) extended 3.5 inches per side to accommodate 22x12-inch front and 22x13-inch rear Forgeline GA3R wheels (ET15 offset) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (295/30/22 front, 315/25/22 rear).

Aerodynamics: Custom carbon fiber hood with a 3-inch cowl scoop (functional for intercooler ducting) and a Varis Japan rear wing (adjustable carbon fiber, 65-inch span) mounted on a custom aluminum subframe. Front splitter is a 3-piece carbon fiber unit from APR Performance with integrated canards, while the rear features a custom aluminum undertray for diffuser support.

Exterior & Lighting: Full de-chrome treatment with a matte military green wrap (3M 2080 series) and blacked-out emblems (Badgeskinz overlays). Lighting upgrades include Morimoto XB LED headlights (DRL and low/high beams), Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights, and a custom LED taillight setup with sequential turn signals (using Osram LED chips and a GTR Lighting harness).
